# House

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="House icon">

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::House;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        House { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
home, living, building, residence, architecture

buildings, home, navigation
